Stop in /usr/ports/multimedia/kino.

Fix: 

A workaround is to deinstall devel/libexecinfo before building
or updating (kino-1.1.1_1) then reinstall devel/libexecinfo.

It appears the problem lies in the backtrace area but its a
bit beyond my skills to do a real fix.
How-To-Repeat: Install devel/libexecinfo and build/update multimedia/kino
